pi_items.source: Confirmed by analyzing setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which explicitly set and use this path.
Confirmed by reading main.py script generated in setup_task.sh, and the export_result.sh verifier logic.
Analyzing setup_task.sh shows that 5 test functions are generated inside tests/test_dashboard.py. Running pytest directly collects 5 items, meaning 5 tests will pass if completely fixed.

privileged_info_summary: The task generates a synthetic financial CSV dataset and python files to create a dashboard. The dashboard code contains four intentional bugs (Timeline Disorder, Hidden Data, Scale Mismatch, Legend Error). To complete the task, an agent must fix the bugs so that the output image is generated properly and all 5 tests defined in tests/test_dashboard.py pass.
